top.name: Maze of Mirrors
top.rules_text: Create 4 illusory copies of yourself on nearby tiles (2 HP each). Enemies target you and the copies at random. A destroyed copy triggers its tile's glyph. Lasts 3 turns.

bottom.name: Web of Fate
bottom.rules_text: Link all prepared glyphs on the board into a network. Triggering any one triggers them all in sequence, each with +1 cumulative damage.

upgrades.description: The copies are sturdier. The web hits harder per link.

changes.value: Create 4 illusory copies (4 HP each). Enemies target you and them at random. Destroyed copies trigger their glyph. Lasts 3 turns.
Link all prepared glyphs. Triggering one triggers all, each +2 cumulative damage.

upgrades.description: Hall of Mirrors: damage to a copy reflects back at the attacker.

changes.value: Create 4 illusory copies (4 HP). Damaging a copy reflects it at the attacker. Destroyed copies trigger their glyph. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Web of Destiny: the network persists after triggering.

changes.value: Link all prepared glyphs permanently. Triggering one triggers all, each +2 cumulative damage.

upgrades.description: Legion of Mirrors: six copies that also attack.

changes.value: Create 6 illusory copies (4 HP) that attack for 3. Damaging one reflects it. Destroyed copies trigger their glyph. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Web of Souls: each glyph triggered banks Weave.

changes.value: Link all glyphs permanently. Triggering one triggers all (+2 cumulative); gain 1 Weave per glyph.

upgrades.description: Infinite Reflection: a swarm that the enemy cannot read.

changes.value: Create 8 permanent illusory copies (6 HP) that attack for 4 and reflect damage. Destroyed copies trigger their glyph.

upgrades.description: The Final Weave: link and detonate the entire board.

changes.value: Link all glyphs permanently, then trigger them all (each +2 cumulative). Gain 1 Weave per glyph.
